zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕1.04窄幅整理，短线走势偏弱，连续未能站稳1.042上方，整体呈震荡下行结构。动能持续减弱，方向不明朗。

MACD柱值为负且动能未修复，短期仍在零轴下方运行；SMA20略高于现价形成压制，反弹力度受限。整体指标偏空结构未改。

下方支撑关注1.035与1.030区域，若失守可能进一步回测1.02；上方阻力位1.042与1.05，突破需放量确认。谨慎对待。

操作建议以区间思路为主，未突破前不宜追涨，短线可在支撑位附近低吸，高位逐步减仓控制风险。等待方向选择信号再行加仓确认。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently exhibiting a very tight consolidation structure around 1.039–1.043, reflecting extremely low volatility and a lack of decisive directional momentum. Price action remains pinned near the session lows, suggesting a mild bearish intraday bias. The broader short-term structure leans neutral-to-slightly bearish as the market trades just beneath the 20-period SMA, indicating that buyers are struggling to reclaim near-term control.

From an indicator standpoint, momentum signals reinforce this cautious tone. MACD is slightly negative at -0.0023, showing weak downward pressure and fading bullish momentum. With RSI(14) unavailable, momentum confirmation relies more heavily on price behavior and moving averages. The fact that price remains below the SMA(20) at 1.0416 suggests that this level is acting as dynamic resistance, capping recovery attempts and keeping upside momentum subdued.

Key support is established at the session low around 1.0395, which is being repeatedly tested and therefore represents a fragile but immediate floor. A breakdown below this level could expose a drift toward the psychological 1.03 zone. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 1.0416 (SMA20), followed by the intraday high near 1.0429, which marks a short-term breakout trigger for bullish continuation.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a clear breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider scalping between 1.0395 support and 1.0416 resistance, while maintaining tight stops due to compressed volatility. A confirmed break above 1.0429 could justify momentum long entries targeting continuation, whereas a breakdown below support would shift bias toward short setups with controlled risk exposure.
